title: proofbundle run-ledger predicate v0.1
description: External/docs schema for the vendored run-ledger/v0.1 predicate (3.2.0 O5, EXPERIMENTAL). A signed ledger of ALL runs of a study against best-of-many cherry-picking: a monotone sequence with a digest chain, aborted runs kept visible, a run budget declared up front, and explicit non-claims. The enforced validator is src/proofbundle/run_ledger.py (hand-rolled, fail-closed). No-Overclaim: the ledger records which runs happened and their order, never that the selected run is representative or that no run outside the ledger exists. lowerCamelCase (ITE-9).

resultDigest.description: content root of this run's result/receipt

prevDigest.description: digest chain link: the resultDigest of run seq-1, or null for the first run

runBudget.description: the maximum number of runs declared BEFORE the study (guards against unbounded best-of-many)

externalRandomnessRef.description: optional commitment to a future/external randomness beacon that ordered or seeded the runs

selectedSeq.description: optional: which run was selected for publication (the ledger keeps all runs regardless)
